pages.title: Portable PreFabs (PreFab-as-Item)
pages.text: PreFabs can be broken and carried as items: $(li)All face configuration persists in item NBT $(li)Cached rates are preserved $(li)Importer/Exporter UUIDs remain linked $(li)Place PreFab elsewhere → Continues from same state$(br2)$(bold)Use cases$(): $(li)Move factory to new location $(li)Store PreFab in Ender Chest $(li)Trade PreFabs with other players (entire factory in one item)

pages.title: Multiple Resource Inputs/Outputs
pages.text: A single PreFab can handle complex factories: NORTH: PULL ITEMS → Importer "Coal" EAST:  PULL ITEMS → Importer "Iron Ore" SOUTH: PULL ITEMS → Importer "Gold Ore" WEST:  PUSH ITEMS ← Exporter "Iron Ingots" UP:    PUSH ITEMS ← Exporter "Gold Ingots" DOWN:  DISABLED$(br2)Each face operates independently.

pages.title: Multi-PreFab Coordination
pages.text: $(bold)Status$(): [WIP] Future feature (Factory Controller block)$(br2)Future versions will support: $(li)Factory Controller block holding multiple PreFabs $(li)Unified resource management $(li)Cross-PreFab dependencies (PreFab A output → PreFab B input)
